text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm on the school roof trying hard to<n>come up
with a good training schedule<n>for <chrname>,
when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I came up here to read my<n>makeup magazine,
but I didn't realize<n>someone was already here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh, you don't seem so happy, though.<n>Wanna
talk about it?
choice_data_list:
I'm just trying to come up with a training
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I see. But fussin' about it all by<n>yourself is a
sure way to send you<n>into a tailspin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, a brief escape can be<n>exactly what
you need.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just do something completely<n>unrelated to get
your mind off it. Eat<n>some delicious food or
whatever as a<n>mood palate cleanser.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's what I'm doing right now! I'm<n>taking a
break from studying for this<n>test that's coming
up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It helps you get back into things with<n>a clear
head. You know, like a mental<n>escape. I think
that's super important,<n>don't you?
choice_data_list:
Thanks for the tip, but I think I'll keep trying a bit
longer.
All right! I'll give this mental escape thing a try!
All right! I'll give this mental escape thing a try!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It helps you get back into things with<n>a clear
head. You know, like a mental<n>escape. I think
that's super important,<n>don't you?
choice_data_list:
Thanks for the tip, but I think I'll keep trying a bit
longer.
All right! I'll give this mental escape thing a try!
All right! I'll give this mental escape thing a try!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ooh, so cool! You're quite the hard<n>worker!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just make sure you don't overdo it.<n>Take a
break when you need it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And if you're really down and out,<n>give me a
shout. I always have an<n>open ear.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As a result of my strong<n>perseverance, I manage
to draft up a<n>satisfactory schedule.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, do it! I'll even join you! No<n>matter how far
we go, I know you'll<n>get back on track right
away!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
How about we go to the cafeteria and<n>eat
something sweet? There must be<n>some dessert
you've been dying to<n>try there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And as a reward for all your hard<n>work, I'll treat
you to it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to playing a bit of hooky—or<n>as Mejiro
Palmer puts it, "mentally<n>escaping"—I manage to
draft up a<n>satisfactory schedule.
